problem.title: Final Problem 2
problem.description: This is the second of the final problems to reach our target of 251 problems.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Two Pointers
solutions.description: This solution uses the two-pointer technique to find the maximum area formed between two vertical lines (container with most water). Starting with the widest possible container, the pointer pointing to the shorter line is moved inward since that is the only way to possibly increase the area. This greedy choice works because width can only decrease, so height must increase.
